description: Post a new tweet on Twitter/X with optional media and reply context. Supports plain text tweets, quote tweets, and replies. Uses human-like typing to avoid bot detection on the compose input.
author: stillwater

reasoning.research: Twitter/X (x.com) compose box is a contenteditable div with data-testid='tweetTextarea_0'. The 'Post' button is button[data-testid='tweetButtonInline'] in the primary compose bar or the tweet modal. Media upload uses input[data-testid='fileInput']. Reply target is set via navigating to the tweet URL before composing. Character limit enforced client-side at 280 chars.
reasoning.selector_strategy: Use data-testid attributes — Twitter uses these consistently across redesigns. The compose area and post button both have stable data-testid values. Fall back to aria-label selectors for accessibility-rich elements.
reasoning.anti_bot_notes: Compose box requires char-by-char typing at 60-120ms. Must click the compose area explicitly before typing — do not auto-focus. If media_urls provided, must click the media upload button and provide file paths. Reply requires navigating to target tweet URL first.
reasoning.llm_learnings: Twitter may show a 'character limit exceeded' indicator — check char count before posting. The compose box toolbar (media, GIF, emoji) must not be accidentally clicked. After posting, the tweet appears in the timeline — wait for success indicator or URL change.
reasoning.performance: Navigation 3s + compose load 2s + typing variable + post 3s. Short tweet (~100 chars): ~15-20s total.

text.example: AI agents are replacing SaaS. The shift is already happening. #AI #AgentDelegation

media_urls.description: Optional list of local file paths or URLs for media attachments (images/video). Max 4 images or 1 video.

reply_to_id.description: Tweet ID to reply to. If provided, the tweet is posted as a reply.

steps.description: Navigate to Twitter/X home feed and wait for primary column to confirm auth
Verify authenticated — if redirected to login flow, abort with SESSION_EXPIRED
Navigate to compose tweet page if not a reply
Navigate to target tweet if posting a reply
Click Reply button on target tweet to open reply compose box
Wait for tweet compose textarea to be interactive
Click compose area to focus it before typing
Type tweet text with human-like delays to bypass bot detection
Click Post button to submit the tweet
Verify tweet was posted without errors
Return post confirmation with tweet ID if extractable from URL or DOM

error_handling.session_expired: Detect x.com/i/flow/login redirect — abort with SESSION_EXPIRED, re-run session login recipe first
error_handling.compose_not_loaded: Retry wait_for_selector with 15s timeout; if still fails, navigate directly to x.com/compose/tweet
error_handling.character_limit_exceeded: Check text length before posting — if > 280 chars, truncate or abort with PARAM_INVALID
error_handling.element_not_found: Log selector tried, capture screenshot, try fallback_selector if defined
error_handling.rate_limited: If 429 or 'Something went wrong' banner detected, wait 60s then retry once
error_handling.duplicate_tweet: Twitter may reject identical tweets — vary text slightly or abort with DUPLICATE_CONTENT
